issue_summary: switch to AtomicInteger for IR's ref count; remove sync from IW's ensureOpen (it's only 'best effort')
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Expert: decreases the refCount of this IndexReader
   * instance.  If the refCount drops to 0, then pending
   * changes (if any) are committed to the index and this
   * reader is closed.
   * 
   * @throws IOException in case an IOException occurs in commit() or doClose()
   *
   * @see #incRef
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Expert: decreases the refCount of this IndexReader
   * instance.  If the refCount drops to 0, then pending
   * changes (if any) are committed to the index and this
   * reader is closed.  If an exception is hit, the refCount
   * is unchanged.
   *
   * @throws IOException in case an IOException occurs in commit() or doClose()
   *
   * @see #incRef
   */
